nodes.label: AI for easy-to-verify tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for tasks requiring deep understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I normally chose to have copilot perform tasks that are easy to verify the changes to or that I already know how to do

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel like I can 100% trust AI's work

nodes.label: AI for repetitive tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for novel or complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I primarily use copilot for doing repetitive work

nodes.label: AI as a collaborative assistant
nodes.grounding_span: For smaller tasks and things that aren't as clear cut I tend to use it more collaboratively

nodes.label: AI adoption driven by leadership
nodes.label_negative: AI adoption driven by personal conviction
nodes.grounding_span: Senior leadership in my workplace is pushing more for the use of AI within the teams

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: updating data sets, replacing references in codebases and producing boilerplate code

nodes.label: Trust and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel like I can 100% trust AI's work

nodes.label: Skill maintenance and professional relevance
nodes.grounding_span: I'm very aware that my line of work could be replaced by AI entirely

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI due to errors
nodes.grounding_span: I have had issues in the past with suggestions which aren't correct or invalid

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about future AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I believe my use of AI will continue to grow, as models improve I may feel less sceptical

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to follow instructions
nodes.grounding_span: despite me trying to direct it to do it correctly it continued to make the same errors

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for repetitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: for very large and very repetitive tasks I would normally delegate entirely to copilot

nodes.label: Verification-oriented approach
nodes.grounding_span: I normally chose to have copilot perform tasks that are easy to verify

nodes.label: Task decomposition strategy
nodes.grounding_span: breaking it down into smaller steps
